summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Open non-security PRs are kept for normal maintainer review unless the hydrated artifact identifies security-sensitive routing or missing live state blocks classification. Closed PRs are recorded as already closed only.
